name: Beast Race Cargo Ship || Goodies
description:
So for whatever reason you end up on this ship carrying literally hundreds of big, breedable beast folk. Khajits, argonians... all tied up upside down, chucked full of drugs and on the way somewhere to be broken. And no one even knows that they're gone! Crazy.
Made this while having a headache. Should still be good...
